pi_items.source: Task description (line 5 of task.json) explicitly requires Name field to be set to 'National Health ID'. This matches the metadata claim exactly.

Task description requires description: 'Unique national health identifier issued by the Ministry of Health for the Health Information Exchange program'. All 5 keywords are present in this text: 'unique', 'national', 'health', 'ministry', 'exchange'. Verified against task.json line 5.

OpenMRS Wiki (https://openmrs.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/docs/pages/25477430/) confirms this is the standard URL format for accessing OpenMRS administration pages. URL structure matches https://localhost/openmrs/admin/... pattern found in OpenMRS search results.

task_utils.sh (line 13) defines BAHMNI_ADMIN_USERNAME='superman'. Web search confirms this is the standard default Bahmni admin username (https://bahmni.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/BAH/pages/3135995905/). Verified from multiple sources.

task_utils.sh (line 14) defines BAHMNI_ADMIN_PASSWORD='Admin123'. Web search confirms this is the standard default Bahmni admin password. Multiple sources including task_utils.sh and Bahmni documentation confirm this is the default.

env.json (line 6) describes 'Bahmni 1.0 Hospital Information System environment. Runs Bahmni Lite (OpenMRS + clinic web app + Crater billing) in Docker inside the VM.' Web search (https://www.bahmni.org) confirms Bahmni is a real, open-source Hospital Information System based on OpenMRS.

export_result.sh (line 20) uses curl to fetch from '${API_URL}/patientidentifiertype' where API_URL='${OPENMRS_BASE_URL}/ws/rest/v1' (task_utils.sh line 10). This is the standard OpenMRS REST API endpoint for patient identifier types. Verified against task_utils.sh configuration.

privileged_info_summary: The task 'create_patient_identifier_type' is a simulation that uses Bahmni/OpenMRS, a real, open-source Hospital Information System. The task creates a Patient Identifier Type named 'National Health ID' with description containing keywords: unique, national, health, ministry, exchange. The admin credentials (username: superman, password: Admin123) are the standard default credentials for Bahmni Docker deployments. The OpenMRS admin interface is accessed via https://localhost/openmrs/admin/index.htm. The task uses the OpenMRS REST API endpoint /ws/rest/v1/patientidentifiertype to verify creation. All metadata values match documented Bahmni/OpenMRS standards.
